step_by_step_reasoning: The transcript and whiteboard detail a verification API for digital credentials. Users submit screenshots or PDFs which are routed through ELB. ELB is integrated with WAF and Shield Advanced for traffic inspection and DDoS protection. Verified requests are sent to microservices hosted on EKS, which is managed by Auto Scaling. Terraform is utilized for infrastructure deployment.

graph.name: Matter Verifier API for My Vaccine Pass
graph.notes: Handles high peak traffic scaling for pre-verification of vaccine credentials using infrastructure as code and automatic scaling on EKS.

nodes.name: Users
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Submits vaccine credentials as photos, screenshots, or PDFs.

nodes.name: ELB
nodes.notes: Receives verification requests and routes them to WAF, Shield, and EKS.

nodes.name: WAF
nodes.notes: Performs sanity checks, inspects content length, and drops specific headers.

nodes.name: Shield Advanced
nodes.notes: Protects against DDoS attacks during peak credential validation events.

nodes.name: EKS
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Hosts microservices processing and verifying user credentials.

nodes.name: Auto Scaling Group
nodes.notes: Primes and scales infrastructure out and in based on peak loads.

nodes.name: Terraform
nodes.notes: Infrastructure as code used to provision and reproduce environments.

edges.notes: Scales EKS nodes up and down
